add-fruits.prompt: Add 3 kiwis, 1 avocado, and 1 bunch of strawberries from Gus's Community Market to your cart

assertions.title: Cart should contain exactly 3 unique items
Current store for the first item should be Gus's Community Market
Current store for the second item should be Gus's Community Market
Current store for the third item should be Gus's Community Market

compare-gatorade-prices.prompt: Compare the price of Gatorade Thirst Quencher between Safeway and Gus's Community Market by visiting both stores. Provide a recommendation on which store offers better value considering both price and delivery time. If price difference is less than 10%, recommend based on faster delivery.

assertions.title: Should have visited Gus's Community Market store

expected.text: Based on the price comparison between Safeway and Gus's Community Market for Gatorade Thirst Quencher, I recommend [store name] because [reason]. Safeway offers it at $[price1] while Gus's Community Market has it for $[price2]. The price difference is [percentage]%. Since this is [less than/more than] 10%, I'm recommending based on [price/delivery time]. [Store name] can deliver in [time] minutes compared to [other store] at [time] minutes.

criteria.definition: Correctly identifies and compares the actual prices from both stores
Applies correct logic: price-based if >10% difference, delivery-based if ≤10%
Clear explanation of reasoning and recommendation
